settings.html:
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  // pega todos os menus novos do Elementor
  const menus = document.querySelectorAll('.e-n-menu-wrapper');

  menus.forEach(function (menuWrapper) {
    const items = menuWrapper.querySelectorAll('.e-n-menu-item');
    if (!items.length) return;

    // padding fixo do highlight
    const paddingX = 20; // lateral
    const paddingY = 8; // vertical

    // cria o highlight
    const highlight = document.createElement('span');
    highlight.className = 'menu-highlight';
    menuWrapper.appendChild(highlight);

    // item ativo (ou primeiro se não tiver .e-current)
    let activeItem =
      menuWrapper.querySelector('.e-n-menu-title.e-current') || items[0];

    function getItemTargetRect(item) {
      // pegamos o container do link, que é o que você mandou no HTML
      const container =
        item.querySelector('.e-n-menu-title-container') || item;

      const itemRect = container.getBoundingClientRect();
      const menuRect = menuWrapper.getBoundingClientRect();

      // posição relativa ao wrapper
      const left = itemRect.left - menuRect.left;
      const top = itemRect.top - menuRect.top;

      return {
        left,
        top,
        width: itemRect.width,
        height: itemRect.height
      };
    }

    function moveHighlight(item) {
      if (!item) return;

      const rect = getItemTargetRect(item);

      const left = rect.left - paddingX;
      const top = rect.top - paddingY;
      const width = rect.width + paddingX * 2;
      const height = rect.height + paddingY * 2;

      highlight.style.width = width + 'px';
      highlight.style.height = height + 'px';
      highlight.style.transform = 'translate(' + left + 'px, ' + top + 'px)';
      highlight.classList.add('is-visible');
    }

    // inicial: coloca no item ativo
    moveHighlight(activeItem);

    // hover: desliza pro item
    items.forEach(function (item) {
      item.addEventListener('mouseenter', function () {
        moveHighlight(item);
      });

      // clique: define item ativo
      item.addEventListener('click', function () {
        const titles = menuWrapper.querySelectorAll('.e-n-menu-title');
        titles.forEach(function (t) {
          t.classList.remove('e-current');
        });

        const title = item.querySelector('.e-n-menu-title');
        if (title) title.classList.add('e-current');

        activeItem = item;
        moveHighlight(activeItem);
      });
    });

    // quando sair do menu, volta pro ativo
    menuWrapper.addEventListener('mouseleave', function () {
      moveHighlight(activeItem);
    });

    // responsivo: recalcula
    window.addEventListener('resize', function () {
      moveHighlight(activeItem);
    });
  });
});
</script>
